body:
For most homes in Pleasanton, a **professional garage door service once a year** is a good maintenance schedule. If your garage door is your primary entrance and gets heavy daily use (multiple drivers, frequent trips in and out), servicing it **every 6 months** is a better choice. [Garage Door & Opener Service, Maintenance & Care Guide](https://garagedoorguides.com/knowledge-center/buying-guides/garage-door-opener-service-maintenance-care-guide/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Maintenance | YBM Garage Doors](https://ybmgaragedoors.com/garage-door-maintenance/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

Pleasanton's climate can also influence maintenance. Hot, dry summers can dry out lubricants and increase wear on moving parts, while the rainy season can contribute to corrosion and alignment changes. Because of this, annual tune-ups help catch small issues before they become expensive repairs. [Comprehensive Garage Door Maintenance in Pleasanton](https://goodgollygarage.com/garage-door-maintenance/garage-door-tune-up-pleasanton-ca?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Maintenance Guide | Riverside, CA](https://www.247garage-door.com/articles/maintaining-your-garage-door-for-long-term-reliability?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

Between professional visits, it's a good idea to:

  * Inspect rollers, hinges, cables, and weatherstripping every few months.

  * Lubricate moving metal parts with a garage-door lubricant about every 6 months (or more often if the door gets heavy use).

  * Test the auto-reverse safety feature monthly.

  * Listen for new squeaking, grinding, or jerky movement, which can indicate it's time for service. [Garage Door & Opener Service, Maintenance & Care Guide](https://garagedoorguides.com/knowledge-center/buying-guides/garage-door-opener-service-maintenance-care-guide/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Often to Lubricate Your Garage Door: Top 3 Tips](https://firstchoicegaragedoorsinc.com/blog/keep-it-greasy-with-regular-garage-door-lubrication/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

You should schedule service sooner than your regular interval if you notice:

  * The door is unusually noisy.

  * It opens unevenly or shakes.

  * It feels heavy when operated manually.

  * The opener struggles or the door doesn't seal properly.

  * Frayed cables, bent tracks, or damaged rollers are visible. [Comprehensive Garage Door Maintenance in Pleasanton](https://goodgollygarage.com/garage-door-maintenance/garage-door-tune-up-pleasanton-ca?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Often Should You Service Your Garage Door in 2026](https://www.doorservpro.com/blog/garage-door-service-guide-2026-0dfcb?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

One important safety note: **torsion springs and lift cables are under high tension and should only be adjusted or replaced by a trained technician.** Routine lubrication and visual inspections are fine for most homeowners, but spring repairs are not considered a DIY task. [Garage Door & Opener Service, Maintenance & Care Guide](https://garagedoorguides.com/knowledge-center/buying-guides/garage-door-opener-service-maintenance-care-guide/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
